name: quarryfi-time-tracker
description: quarryFi R&D time tracking for OpenAI Codex — multi-company profiles with project routing and audit logging

interface.shortDescription: Track R&D time in Codex for tax credit documentation
interface.longDescription: Automatically tracks coding sessions in Codex CLI and Codex App. Supports multiple company profiles with project-to-key routing — freelancers can track R&D time for different clients from a single config. Includes local audit logging. Uses the same ~/.quarryfi/config.json as the Claude Code plugin.
defaultPrompt: Check my quarryFi R&D tracking status
